BaseAnimId.Wiki: ID of the animation to be retargeted

ReTargetAnimId_begin.Wiki: ID of the animation to retarget to the base animation

ReTargetAnimId_01.Wiki: ID of the animation to retarget to the base animation

ReTargetAnimId_02.Wiki: ID of the animation to retarget to the base animation

ReTargetAnimId_03.Wiki: ID of the animation to retarget to the base animation

ReTargetAnimId_04.Wiki: ID of the animation to retarget to the base animation

ReTargetAnimId_05.Wiki: ID of the animation to retarget to the base animation

ReTargetAnimId_06.Wiki: ID of the animation to retarget to the base animation

ReTargetAnimId_end.Wiki: ID of the animation to retarget to the base animation

Self.Wiki: Defines fields related to animation retargeting.
